description: 'Ispahan, moitié du monde' : joyau de l'architecture islamique persane avec sa place Naghch-e Djahan, ses mosquées aux dômes turquoise et ses ponts safavides.

description_en: Ispahan, in Iran, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.7/5. Muslim travelers will find 101 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
